extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won from a 30-rider breakaway after clinging desperately to SCHJØNBERG and BERWICK on the final climb, then outlasting both in the sprint.
tactical_patterns: DENZ survived near-elimination on Colle Braida through pure resistance, then attacked 12km out, signaling vulnerability that converts to aggression.
Five-rider split from 30-man break formed at 90km out, suggesting large breakaways fracture predictably on first categorized climb.
PEDERSEN attacked intermediate sprint while break still forming, prioritizing points competition over stage victory with Milan in race.

rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: transformed from visibly suffering ('teeth gritted') on penultimate climb to successful attacker 12km later, elite recovery capacity
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: abandoned race due to illness, critical sprinter depth loss for team in middle of Grand Tour
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: actively racing points classification from breakaway, cut MILAN Jonathan's lead to 24 points despite being in escape group
rider_signals.BATTISTELLA Samuele: negative: dropped from breakaway despite making initial selection, illness compromising ability to capitalize on break opportunity
rider_signals.BERWICK Sebastian: neutral: first rider eliminated in three-up sprint despite making all key selections, positioning or sprint speed deficit exposed
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: retained pink jersey by 2 seconds over ROGLIČ, minimal time management before Alpine stages suggests confidence or risk tolerance
